name: serial-mcp
description: Headless MCP server for AI-assisted embedded-board serial log debugging, gated command writes, and board resets.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect serial logs and run approved board command/reset workflows through MCP.
interface.longDescription: Serial MCP lets Codex inspect ESP32, STM32, and other embedded-board text logs through a FastMCP server. It also supports user-approved send_serial_command and reset_board workflows with audit markers. Codex currently needs the MCP server registered through top-level codex mcp configuration, so this plugin ships the serial skill plus scripts/install-codex.ps1 to add the server without hand-editing config.toml.
defaultPrompt: Use Serial MCP to inspect board logs, reset a board after approval, and run a clear, trigger, query debugging loop.
